channel.title: Counter-Hegemonic Media on Condado Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Counter-Hegemonic Media on Condado Lab

item.title: Brazilian Blogosfera Progressista: Digital Vanguards in Dark Times
item.description: The article explores the Brazilian Blogosfera Progressista (Progressive Blogosphere), a leftist political communication initiative aiming to conciliate an institutionalized model of organization with a networked model of action. The BP proved able to counter effectively the mainstream media’s political framings, thanks to wise networking strategies which explored the communicative opportunities offered by social media.
